page_sub: Private sessions, group events, and creative services — all tailored to you.
private_body:
Your individual needs and goals can be met with private yoga study. My one-to-one sessions are tailored entirely to you — your body, your pace, and the gifts yoga has to offer: purification of body and mind, clarity, and a calm, energized spirit.

Regular private practice helps you feel more comfortable in your body, build strength and flexibility, and develop tools for stress and life's busy moments.
private_includes: Guidance for beginners through intermediate practitioners
private_details: 60 and 90-minute sessions available at my home studio or at your home.
events_body:
Bring the joy of yoga to your next gathering! I offer customized yoga experiences for:

Girls' Night In · Family Night · Bridal Showers · Birthday Parties · Corporate Wellness

These fun, inclusive sessions are a perfect way to bond, unwind, and move together.
services_body: Beyond the mat, I also offer:

services.title: Blog Post Writing
services.body: Wellness, yoga, travel, and lifestyle content.

services.title: Social Media Content
services.body: Facebook and Twitter content creation for wellness brands.

services.title: Online Marketing
services.body: Digital marketing support for health and wellness businesses.

services.title: Travel Writing
services.body: Reviews and features for spas, yoga retreats, restaurants, hotels, and destinations.

contact_body: Ready to start or curious about what's the best fit? Reach out and let's have a conversation.
